title: RSW 1 Bottle and Teat Brush, 2 Brushes in 1, Ideal for Cleaning Training Cups, Wide Neck Bottles, Lids, Valves, Baby, 2 in
features: Brosse pour biberon et tétine 2 en 1 ZEQUK 2 brosses en 1 Idéal pour nettoyer les gobelets d'apprentissage, les bouteilles à col large, les couvercles et les valves
description: This versatile 2-in-1 cleaning brush is specifically designed to simplify the care of baby feeding accessories. The dual-function design combines a bottle brush and teat brush in one convenient tool, making it an essential item for maintaining hygiene standards. The brush is particularly effective for cleaning training cups, wide neck bottles, lids, and valves, reaching into difficult areas where residue can accumulate. The bottle brush features bristles that thoroughly clean interior surfaces, while the integrated teat brush provides precise cleaning for smaller components and narrow openings. This cleaning brush offers a practical solution for parents seeking to maintain their baby's feeding equipment in pristine condition, ensuring thorough sanitization of all bottle parts and accessories.
